A '''red-skinned reptilian [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]]''' was indigenous to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Sarrish/Legends|Sarrish]].

==Biology and appearance==
A [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]], they possessed [[Reptile/Legends|reptilian]] features. They had glossy [[Color/Legends|red]] skin and light yellow eyes, with slightly protruding and discolored teeth. Their heads appeared to be partially bifurcated, with a deep ridge that ran toward the back of their skull. They possessed thick lips, a heavy brow, and small ears.

==Society and culture==
They lived on a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of the [[Sarrish/Legends|same name]], a world that possessed rocky plains and plateaus. As members of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], they were represented within the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]]. Despite being members of the Republic, they maintained their own military, the [[Sarrish Defense Force]].

At least one member of this species, [[Veedaaz Awmetth/Legends|Veedaaz Awmetth]], possessed prominent white [[Tattoo/Legends|tattoos]] upon his face.

==History==
At some point in their history, they joined the Galactic Republic and became members of the Galactic Senate. During the last [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of that august body, [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] Veedaaz Awmetth represented the [[Vensensor sector/Legends|Vensensor sector]] within the galactic government.

In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], the Republic was wracked with conflict as the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] incited both the government and the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] to action, beginning the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Though their sector laid close to Separatist-controlled space, they remained loyal to the Republic. Circa [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]], the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist Droid Army]] entrenched themselves upon the planet's surface, forcing the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] into a ground war. Though brave actions by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Clone Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Cody/Legends|CC-2224]] seemed to turn the tide of the battle, in the end, Sarrish became the site of one of the Confederacy's greatest victories.

At the end of the Clone Wars, in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], Senator [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]] [[Death/Legends|died]] during childbirth and was sent to her [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] to be buried. Sarrish Senator Awmetth was one of many mourners who attended her [[Padmé Amidala's funeral/Legends|funeral]].

==Behind the scenes==
Veedaaz Awmetth, the only member of this species to appear to date, was a character portrayed by [[Nicholas Ferguson]] for [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Revenge of the Sith'']]. His appearance, however, never made it into the final release of the film.

[[Dave Elsey]], the creature shop creative supervisor for ''Revenge of the Sith'', based Veedaaz's appearance on a possible design of [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] as an [[Alien/Legends|alien]]; the two share similar patterns on their heads.<ref name="swi73">{{InsiderCite|73|Prequel Update}}</ref>
